meaning: n.胚胎,胎儿,胚芽adj.胚胎的,初期的
examples: Embryo research is an emotive issue.
An eight-week-old embryo is only an inch long.
The sex of the embryo is predetermined at fertilization.
This is almost like having the embryo in the womb with a camera on them.
Many people have a strongly held religious conviction that destroying a human embryo is murder.
